positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a crescent moon cradling a constellation of stylized, geometric woodland animals (fox, deer, owl, rabbit). The composition should be centered and balanced, suitable for a T-shirt graphic. Use clean, continuous white line work on a dark, deep navy blue background. Incorporate subtle dot-work stippling to suggest depth and night sky texture. The style should be modern, whimsical, and highly detailed, evoking celestial folklore. Studio lighting, high contrast, vector art feel, print-ready quality.
negative: photorealistic, 3D render, logo, text, watermark, dirty, noise, artifact, messy lines, grain, blur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, saturated colors, busy, complex background
